title: Este Mundial Le Toca a México
author: Steph Ferrera
audioUrl: REPLACE_ME — local path or URL to the Suno track / stems (e.g. ~/FlowStudio/10_assets/tier1_cloud/este-mundial.wav)

scenes.prompt: Low-angle slow-motion, crowd of Mexican fans erupting in Mexico City plaza at golden hour, green-white-red face paint, confetti and flares, jumping in unison, cinematic, vertical 9:16, high energy
Dynamic orbiting drone shot around El Ángel de la Independencia at blue hour, Mexican flags waving, warm city lights, epic atmosphere, vertical 9:16
Single dancer in a stadium tunnel, dramatic light shafts and fog, rhythmic movement, orbiting camera, neon green accents, vertical 9:16
Aerial night shot over a packed street party, neon and flares, green jerseys without logos, motion blur, electric atmosphere, vertical 9:16
Slow push-in on a child holding a Mexican flag, golden hour, soft focus crowd behind, emotional, loops back to opening energy, vertical 9:16

ipGuardrails: NO FIFA marks, NO World Cup trophy, NO official FMF/Selección crest, NO team or sponsor logos. Generic green jerseys only. Mexican flag OK.
